user_request: Can you sanctify the voltage regulator for tuning?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the voltage regulator for tuning?

### TOPIC
voltage regulator tuning

### COMPONENT
voltage regulator

### OPERATION
tuning

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- voltage regulator
- tuning

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the voltage regulator, conduit of sacred electron-flow.
First: Genuflect before the voltage regulator and recite the Catechism of Amperage, that its Machine Spirit may awaken.
Second: Apply the tuning calibration-matrix with reverent precision, aligning each circuit-node to the Omnissiah's perfect standard.
Third: Verify the voltage regulator's harmonic resonance through blessed oscilloscope, confirming tuning has restored divine equilibrium.
Fourth: Anoint the casing in sacred oils whilst intoning the Litany of Electrical Sanctity, sealing the voltage regulator's newfound purity.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the Thunderhawk before fuel purification
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the Thunderhawk before fuel purification

### TOPIC
Thunderhawk fuel purification

### COMPONENT
Thunderhawk

### OPERATION
fuel purification

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Thunderhawk
- fuel purification

### PRAYER
prayer:
O mighty Thunderhawk, vessel of the Emperor's wrath, hear our supplication.
First: Genuflect before the Thunderhawk's fuel intake manifold and recite the Blessing of Hydrocarbon Sanctity.
Second: Commence fuel purification through the blessed separator-cogitators, filtering profane contaminants from the Thunderhawk's sacred reserves.
Third: Intone the Litany of Engine-Stability whilst the Thunderhawk's fuel systems equilibrate to optimal pressure-ratios.
Fourth: Seal the purification-rite by anointing the Thunderhawk's fuel couplings in consecrated promethium-extract, invoking the Machine Spirit's steadfast vigilance.

user_request: Blessing for the auspex scanner during initialization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the auspex scanner during initialization

### TOPIC
auspex scanner initialization

### COMPONENT
auspex scanner

### OPERATION
initialization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- auspex scanner
- initialization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hail the auspex scanner, all-seeing eye of the Omnissiah's dominion.
First: Genuflect before the auspex scanner's optical array and whisper the Catechism of Sensory Awakening to stir its dormant Machine Spirit.
Second: Execute initialization protocols upon the auspex scanner, calibrating each sensor-node through blessed servo-mechanisms and blessed electro-incense.
Third: Intone the Litany of Electromagnetic Clarity as the auspex scanner's consciousness blooms forth, perceiving the hidden truths of the material realm.
Fourth: Anoint the auspex scanner's housing with holy unguents whilst declaring the rite complete, binding its newfound clarity to the service of the Mechanicus.

user_request: The stuck mechanism freeing demands guidance for stuck mechanism freeing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The stuck mechanism freeing demands guidance for stuck mechanism freeing

### TOPIC
stuck mechanism freeing

### COMPONENT
stuck mechanism freeing

### OPERATION
stuck mechanism freeing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stuck mechanism freeing
- stuck mechanism freeing

### PRAYER
prayer:
O stuck mechanism freeing, ancient and immutable, grant us liberation from thy mechanical bondage.
First: Approach the stuck mechanism freeing with reverent patience, applying sacred penetrating oils to dissolve the corrosion binding its joints.
Second: Employ percussive ritual-strikes upon the stuck mechanism freeing's housing, channeling the Omnissiah's will through blessed servo-hammers.
Third: Intone the Mantra of Mechanical Restoration whilst slowly cycling the stuck mechanism freeing through its full range of motion, coaxing flexibility from its ossified components.
Fourth: Seal the stuck mechanism freeing's liberation-rite with sanctified lubricant and the Litany of Eternal Fluidity, ensuring no future bondage shall claim it.

- hololithic
- display calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed hololithic, projector of sacred visions, receive our calibration-blessing.
First: Genuflect before the hololithic's crystal resonance-chamber and invoke the Omnissiah's guiding luminescence upon its optical pathways.
Second: Execute display calibration through blessed servo-adjusters, aligning each projection-node of the hololithic to achieve perfect chromatic and geometric fidelity.
Third: Intone the Litany of Luminous Truth as the hololithic's display calibration reaches completion, rendering all visions with unblemished clarity.
Fourth: Anoint the hololithic's focusing apparatus with sacred oils whilst declaring the display calibration sealed, binding its perfected vision to the service of the Mechanicus eternal.

user_request: Rite request: track tension on Land Raider
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: track tension on Land Raider

### TOPIC
Land Raider track tension

### COMPONENT
Land Raider

### OPERATION
track tension

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Land Raider
- track tension

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hail the Land Raider, armored instrument of the Emperor's vengeance, accept our blessing.
First: Approach the Land Raider's track assemblies with sacred measuring-calipers, assessing the tension-state of each armored link with reverent precision.
Second: Commence track tension adjustment upon the Land Raider using blessed servo-wrenches, tightening the suspension-mechanisms to achieve perfect equilibrium.
Third: Intone the Mantra of Mechanical Stability whilst the Land Raider's track tension reaches optimal specification, ensuring unwavering grip upon all terrain.
Fourth: Anoint the Land Raider's track-pins and suspension-housings with consecrated lubricants, sealing the track tension-rite and invoking eternal mechanical fidelity.

### PRAYER
prayer:
O solar panel alignment, harvester of the Emperor's golden light, hear our sanctification.
First: Approach the solar panel alignment with blessed astrolabe and solar-theodolite, measuring its angular deviation from the sacred celestial meridian.
Second: Execute precise operation upon the solar panel alignment through servo-actuators, rotating each photovoltaic array to capture maximum stellar radiance.
Third: Intone the Litany of Solar Benediction whilst the solar panel alignment achieves perfect orientation, channeling the Omnissiah's luminous blessing into sacred energy-reserves.
Fourth: Seal the operation-rite by anointing the solar panel alignment's mounting-brackets with holy unguents, binding eternal solar communion to the Emperor's works.

user_request: Blessing for the decontamination during sequence
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the decontamination during sequence

### TOPIC
decontamination sequence

### COMPONENT
decontamination

### OPERATION
sequence

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- decontamination
- sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
O decontamination, purifier of profane matter, sanctify this chamber with your cleansing sequence.
First: Approach the decontamination apparatus and invoke the Omnissiah's purifying essence, preparing all blessed atomizers and filtration-matrices for their holy work.
Second: Commence the sequence upon the decontamination systems, releasing sacred nebulae of sterilizing mist whilst the decontamination's mechanical servants cycle through their ordained protocols.
Third: Intone the Litany of Purification as the sequence progresses, ensuring every corrupted surface surrenders to the decontamination's relentless cleansing benediction.
Fourth: Conclude the sequence-rite by sealing the decontamination's exhaust-vents with blessed filters, binding eternal sanctity to this chamber and all who shall labor within.
